en_title: Call of Duty Movie to Take Place in the Modern Warfare Universe, Director Confirms
cn_title: 《使命召唤》电影确定以「现代战争」宇宙为背景
subtitle: 银幕现代战
opus_summary: 派拉蒙影业与动视确认，《使命召唤》电影将以「现代战争」宇宙为背景，由Peter Berg执导并与Taylor Sheridan共同编剧，定于2028年6月30日上映。

paragraphs.en: Paramount Pictures and Activision have confirmed the upcoming Call of Duty movie will take place in its long-running Modern Warfare universe.
paragraphs.cn: 派拉蒙影业与动视确认，即将推出的《使命召唤》电影将以系列延续多年的「现代战争」宇宙为背景。

paragraphs.en: The crew behind the upcoming video game-to-movie adaptation revealed the update as part of a Call of Duty in Culture Panel at Fanatics Fest in New York City today (via Variety ). Call of Duty movie director and co-writer Peter Berg made an appearance at the event to share the news.
paragraphs.cn: 据《综艺》报道，这部游戏改编电影的主创团队今天在纽约Fanatics Fest的「文化中的《使命召唤》」座谈会上公布了消息。电影导演兼联合编剧Peter Berg现身活动并分享相关信息。

paragraphs.en: Berg and co-writer Taylor Sheridan's choice to set their Call of Duty movie in the Modern Warfare universe may come as much of a surprise for some fans, but it might finally give us some clues about its yet-to-be-detailed plot. Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare was the first in Activision's first-person shooter series to introduce players to a, well, more modern take on the franchise when it launched in 2007. As it left behind the mid-1900s battlefields established by previous games, it also brought along new characters, such as Soap, Ghost, Captain Price, and series villain Vladimir Makarov.
paragraphs.cn: Berg与联合编剧Taylor Sheridan选择把电影放在「现代战争」宇宙中，或许会令部分粉丝意外，但也终于为尚未公开的剧情提供了一些线索。2007年发售的《使命召唤4：现代战争》首次让动视这套第一人称射击系列走向更现代的战场。游戏告别前作建立的1900年代中期战场，也带来了肥皂、幽灵、普莱斯上尉以及系列反派Vladimir Makarov等新角色。

paragraphs.en: Director Peter Berg revealed today at @FanaticsFest the @CallOfDutyMovie is set in the Modern Warfare universe.
paragraphs.cn: 导演Peter Berg今天在@FanaticsFest透露，@CallOfDutyMovie将以「现代战争」宇宙为背景。
影片将于2028年6月30日登陆影院。

paragraphs.en: On the gaming side of things, Modern Warfare has spent the last two decades attempting to reinvent itself across six mainline entries, and even a few remasters . The first three games, which arrived throughout the late 2000s and early 2010s, primarily followed Task Force 141 as they embarked on globe-trotting missions, while gaining (and losing) teammates along the way.
paragraphs.cn: 在游戏领域，「现代战争」过去20年间通过六部主线作品和数款复刻版不断重塑自身。最初三部作品分别在2000年代末至2010年代初推出，主要讲述141特遣队执行横跨全球的任务，并在途中迎来（也失去）队友。

paragraphs.en: Activision and developer Infinity Ward took a break from the somewhat more grounded settings of Modern Warfare through the mid-2010s before delivering a full-fledged reboot with Call of Duty: Modern Warfare in 2019. It's expanded on this chapter with returning characters and new stories, with its next entry, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 , set to launch for PC, Nintendo Switch 2, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S October 23, 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 动视与开发商Infinity Ward在2010年代中期暂时告别了「现代战争」相对写实的设定，直到2019年以《使命召唤：现代战争》全面重启系列。此后作品通过回归角色和新故事不断扩展这一篇章；下一部《使命召唤：现代战争4》将于2026年10月23日登陆PC、任天堂Nintendo Switch 2、PS5和XBOX Series。

paragraphs.en: Why Paramount and Activision opted to kick off its Call of Duty film ambitions with Modern Warfare instead of something like the Black Ops series, which recently celebrated the release of PlayStation ports for Black Ops 1 and 2 , is unclear. Berg also neglected to mention whether his adaptation will retread events players may remember from the games or carve out its own corner of the universe.
paragraphs.cn: 派拉蒙与动视为何选择以「现代战争」而非《黑色行动》等系列启动《使命召唤》电影计划，目前尚不清楚；《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》最近刚推出PlayStation移植版。Berg也没有说明这部改编作品会重现玩家熟悉的游戏事件，还是在该宇宙中开辟独立故事。

paragraphs.en: The Call of Duty movie has a release date of June 30, 2028. Its plot and cast remain a mystery, for now. While we wait for udpates, you can see what Berg once said about people who play video games .
paragraphs.cn: 《使命召唤》电影定于2028年6月30日上映，剧情与演员阵容目前仍是谜。
